---
name: Agent request
about: Propose a new agent
title: "[agent] "
labels: agent-request
---

## What would the agent do

(One sentence: input → output.)

## Input format

Markdown? JSON? What fields are required?

## Output format

JSON Schema? Rego? Plain text? What is the rule for validating correctness *without* an LLM call?

## Why this agent

A concrete use case. Who would invoke it and when.

## Verification

How will offline eval cases (`tests/cases.jsonl`) check that the output is correct?

## Are you offering to draft it?

If yes, when do you expect to open a PR?
